# PGS Occupational Medicine Solutions

> Occupational medicine solutions for employers nationwide. 24/7 injury response, telehealth, nurse triage, and MRO services.

## Contact
- Phone: 225-408-2810
- Email: operations@primeglobal.co
- Address: PO Box 995 Port Allen, LA 70767, Port Allen, LA 70767

## Services
  - 24/7 Support
  - Telehealth Virtual Consultation
  - Peer-to-Peer Consultation
  - Third-Party Vetting
  - Opinion Report
  - MRO Services
